query: SELECT damage_description, damaged_components_json FROM ai_assessments WHERE id = 2010001;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3zQEb4HwERZa3vD.6f0bc5e32ffe --database YbS42LwGroxbVepAMjk4bS --execute SELECT damage_description, damaged_components_json FROM ai_assessments WHERE id = 2010001;

rows.damage_description: Toyota Hilux (2022). Damages sustained are consistent with the circumstances reported. Bodywork Damaged, Paintwork Damaged, General Mechanical Damaged. Vehicle got scratched on the right by trees. The impact was on bull bar and bonnet.. 31 damaged components identified.
